source_note: Mississippi Public Utilities Staff (MPUS) Annual Report for the year ending June 30, 2024 (Charles Jim Beckett, Executive Director), 20 pp. MPUS is the independent staff that, per the Mississippi PSC's General Orders, conducts year-round audits of the investor-owned utilities' fuel-adjustment clauses and purchased-gas adjustments — including Entergy Mississippi's Energy Cost Recovery (ECR) rider and Mississippi Power Company's fuel cost recovery (FCR) rider — and reviews rate and prudence matters. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Mississippi Public Service Commission (psc.ms.gov/sites/default/files/2024-MPUS-Annual-Report.pdf).
